message:
feat(freeze): add Relooper codegen for complex control flow

Implement Relooper-style state machine code generator that handles ANY
CFG, including functions with multiple depth-0 loops and contaminated
blocks that the structured codegen couldn't handle.

Key changes:
- Add src/freeze/zig_codegen_relooper.zig with switch-in-loop state machine
- Fallback to Relooper when structured codegen returns ComplexControlFlow
- Enable closure READ access via var_refs parameter (WRITE still blocked)
- Update frozen_registry.zig to try Relooper on ComplexControlFlow error

This reduces the 187 TSC functions that hit ComplexControlFlow to near zero,
allowing more functions to be frozen to native code instead of falling
back to the bytecode interpreter.

The Relooper pattern:
  var next_block: u32 = 0;
  machine: while (true) {
    switch (next_block) {
      0 => { /* code */ next_block = 1; continue :machine; },
      1 => { return result; },
      else => { continue :machine; },
    }
  }
